project.title: Prison Break Arena
project.description: Top-down action game set in a brutal maximum-security prison.
project.art_direction: gritty stylized 2D game art, desaturated gray-blue palette with orange accents, thick readable silhouettes

plan.prompt: Rusty shiv, prison guard baton, handcuffs, contraband cigarette pack, in a 2x2 grid, each item centered in its cell. Gritty stylized 2D game art, desaturated gray-blue palette with orange accents, thick readable silhouettes, consistent scale. Pure flat white background (#FFFFFF), uniform studio backdrop, no border, no frame.
negative_hints: One kit image — slice into separate icons after generation.
